checks.name: replayed zeta equals the archived card value
zeta reproduces the PAPER reproducibility anchor 0.1076472949 + 0.0736514853 i
contact fraction reproduces the paper anchor 1.304275e-1
orientation note RECORDED: c_hat = -K_tr(paper); M_* = sigma_max(M_R)
forward seesaw closes: the replayed M_R returns the OLD benchmark targets to 1e-9 (inverse <-> forward loop shut)
heavy Majorana spectrum exported for DYN-7 (leptogenesis feed)
aligned 6-tensor basis is orthonormal (5 Veronese + contact); Audit-1b requires >= 3 aligned tensors with per-tensor residuals
residual cascade terminates at machine zero (complete decomposition, not a hollow two-tensor test)
target shift table computed; the sin^2 theta_23 octant flip is the dominant refresh (old benchmark sits several sigma high)
pipeline sanity: chi^2 of the benchmark against the OLD targets is ~ 0
benchmark pull table vs NuFit-6.0 DISCLOSED (theta_23 drives it)
zeta-plane scan complete (161 x 241); minimum located
residual tension after the zeta-only refit DISCLOSED: with the Dirac sector frozen, zeta alone cannot absorb the theta_23 octant flip if chi^2_min stays large (a finding either way)
zeta posterior published: best point, profile Delta-chi^2 <= 1 intervals on |zeta| and arg zeta, distance from the benchmark
delta_CP at the best point reported as a PREDICTION vs NuFit (both sin-branches; not fitted)
historical LOOSE windows REGRESS as half-widths of the two-sided interval: paper anchors 3.208798e-5 and 5.424119e-5 rad
historical TIGHT windows also regress against the archived card (9.9379e-7 scale, 1.7993e-6 rad phase)
refreshed Delta-chi^2 <= 1 windows about the NEW best point published

derivation_log.step_1_replay: Y_e -> U_e (eigh ascending); U_nu = U_e U_PMNS(old benchmark incl. Majorana phases 0.35pi, 1.10pi); m_light = U_nu* D U_nu*^T; mD = Y_nu * 100 GeV; M_R = -mD^T m_light^-1 mD (inverse type-I); M_* = sigma_max; zeta = <c_hat, M_R/M_*>, c_hat = -K_tr(paper)
derivation_log.step_2_rank_contract: orthonormal 6-tensor cascade (contact + 5 Veronese), per-tensor coefficients and residuals recorded
derivation_log.step_3_refresh: old hardcoded targets vs NuFit-6.0 NO (both variants); theta_23 octant flip dominates
derivation_log.step_4_posterior: M_R(zeta') = M_*(M_V + zeta' c_hat), forward seesaw, chi^2 over 5 observables (IC24 1-sigma); grid 161x241 in (|zeta| scale, phase); profile Delta-chi^2 <= 1 intervals
derivation_log.step_5_windows: historical loose windows re-derived with the archival tolerance definition (regression), then recomputed as Delta-chi^2 windows at the new best point

provenance.nufit: NuFit-6.0, JHEP 12 (2024) 216, arXiv:2410.05380, Table 1 (Normal Ordering); 1-sigma symmetrized

zeta_posterior.conditional_on: benchmark Y_nu, Y_e frozen; NO; m1 = 1e-3 eV
